rationale: P7-01 BLOCK — baseline rotated as part of /code-review --fix follow-up PR for the 3 structural findings deferred from the initial sweep: (#9) route now passes already-resolved `entry` into provider.embed to close the torn-snapshot race window between applyPreflight's resolve and the provider's re-resolve under hot-reload; (#12) semaphore acquisition moved out of the route — route now threads `semaphore: opts.semaphores.get(entry.backend)` into provider.embed so the slot is held only when an upstream call actually fires (restores EMB-H01 hot-cache free-path). All vitest regression on router/tests/routes/embeddings.test.ts + new real-factory tests in router/tests/providers/embedding-provider.test.ts pass.
